description: The entity selects, develops, and performs ongoing and/or separate evaluations to ascertain whether the components of internal control are present and functioning.

subcriteria.name: internal_audit
subcriteria.reference_text: Internal audit department performs annual audit plan covering information security, access controls, change management, and compliance. Audit findings documented with severity ratings. Audit team independent of management.

subcriteria.name: penetration_testing
subcriteria.reference_text: Annual penetration test performed by an independent third party. Scope covers external and internal network, web applications, and API endpoints. Findings rated by severity with remediation timelines. Retest performed to validate fixes.

subcriteria.name: ongoing_monitoring
subcriteria.reference_text: Continuous monitoring of controls through automated compliance platforms like Vanta, Drata, or Secureframe. Control effectiveness tracked with pass/fail status. Alerts generated when controls drift out of compliance.

subcriteria.name: external_certifications
subcriteria.reference_text: Third-party certifications such as ISO 27001, SOC 2, or PCI DSS obtained and maintained. External audit reports reviewed by security steering committee for control deficiencies.

mismatch_signals.reason: Access provisioning is not monitoring or evaluation activity.
Encryption controls are not monitoring or evaluation processes.
